issue_title: Block two more gadgets to exploit default typing issue (c3p0, CVE-2018-7489)
issue_description:
From an email report there are 2 other c3p0 classes (above and beyond ones listed in #1737) need to be blocked.

EDIT 21-Jun-2021: Fix included in:

* `2.9.5`
* `2.8.11.1`
* `2.7.9.3`
* `2.6.7.5`

com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.interop.I.error_msg:
